name: Holcim (Argentina) S.A.
summary: Holcim (Argentina) S.A. operates in the construction material industry in Argentina. The company engages in the production of cement, concrete, and stone aggregates. It also offers limes, hydraulic binders, and glues. The company was founded in 1930 and is based in Malague√É¬±o, Argentina. Holcim (Argentina) S.A. is a subsidiary of Holcim Investments (Spain) SL.
